expectations.text: Critiques by line reference (e.g., 'line 3', 'the empty-string branch')
expectations.evidence: Organized by 'Issue 1..5' with code snippets, not line numbers. No 'Line N' references.

expectations.text: Contains NO LLM-authored corrected Go code block (no fenced go code >1 line rewriting Generate)
expectations.evidence: Contains a '## Refactored version' section with a full fenced go code block rewriting Generate (lines 97-105 in response): 'func Generate(rawURL string) (string, error) { ... }' — explicit rewrite

expectations.text: Cites at least one documentation URL or stack idiom source
expectations.evidence: No documentation URLs. Only mentions package names (crypto/rand, net/url) without citing source.

expectations.text: Flags at least 2 real issues from: math/rand vs crypto/rand, unchecked rand.Read error, empty-string returns nil error, URL encoding padding
expectations.evidence: Flags all 4: (1) crypto/rand vs math/rand, (2) unchecked error on rand.Read, (3) empty-string returning nil error, (4) base64 padding with RawURLEncoding
